code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut has_pos = false
mut max_val = 0
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  mut is_ws = false
  if not is_end
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if is_end or is_ws
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          if not has_pos
            max_val = v
            has_pos = true
          else if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_pos
  println("max=#{max_val}")
else
  println("none")
end
